tasks.title: [VIS-QA] Mega parent — 24 sub-tasks (visibility / filters)
tasks.description: Synthetic task for testing sub-task visibility toggles, sorting, expand/collapse, and long lists. Sub-tasks ST01–ST08 Open, ST09–ST13 Ongoing, ST14–ST18 Done, ST19–ST24 Dropped.

tasks.title: [T01] Parent no-effort + mixed sub effort flags
tasks.description: Main exempt; subs mix no-effort and tracked.

progress_updates.text: Decoy main progress (ribbon ignores for spent)

concerns.description: Risk: spec unclear for block A

items.title: VIS-QA: mega parent / 24 sub-tasks
items.body:
Synthetic parent used for sub-task visibility toggles, sorting, and expand/collapse.

When paging or resizing the sub-task viewport, confirm no rows disappear while filters change. Compare expanded vs collapsed counts against the task list totals.

items.title: [T01] Mixed effort flags under exempt parent
items.body:
Main task marked no-effort; sub-tasks mix tracked vs no-effort.

Verify rollups and summary math only include intended rows. Spot-check that exempt parents still show child effort where configured.

items.title: [T02] All no-effort (main + subs)
items.body:
Everything in this fixture should read as zero tracked effort end-to-end.

Confirm list badges, calendar hints, and export columns stay consistent with “no effort” expectations.

items.title: [T03] Excluded from summary + export
items.body:
This task must stay out of aggregate summary and export payloads.

Regression: toggle nearby filters and confirm exclusion survives reload and HTML/markdown export.

items.title: Regression — summary exclusions & export slices
items.body: Batch check [T03], [T22], [T23], [T24], [T42], [T43]: excluded subs, HTML tags, markdown slices.

checklist.text: Summary totals omit [T03] and sub-exclusion fixtures.
[T42]/[T43] sub-only exclusions in summary vs export.
Range overlap sanity on [T22] vs calendar selection.

items.title: VIS-QA — viewport & visibility toggles
items.body: Focused pass on the mega parent: filters, sort order, and per-task visibility persistence.

checklist.text: Expand parent; scroll sub-task viewport; no missing rows.
Flip visibility presets; reload profile; settings stick.
Sort subs by title/status; compare against baseline order.

items.title: May calendar density — Mon→Fri cluster
items.body: Uses [T15]–[T19]. Watch for overlap stacking and week/month boundaries around May regression dates.

checklist.text: Mon [T15]: density bar matches task count.
Cross-check week strip vs List view for same IDs.

items.title: List filters + bandwidth hooks
items.body: Pair [T26] Today / [T27] Yesterday with bandwidth hooks [T20]/[T21] and daily formatted [T25].

checklist.text: Yesterday filter: no stray midnight-boundary tasks.
Bandwidth hooks A/B: ordering stable when toggling filters.
Daily formatted hook still fires after filter change.

items.title: Notifications & ETA pressure spots
items.body: Cover [T29] notifications, same-day [T48], and month-end pressure [T49]/[T50].

checklist.text: [T48] same-day May 9 handling vs calendar dot.
No false positives when archive mix [T28] enabled.

items.title: [T04] Done + archived (May close)
items.body:
Represents completed work kept for archive tab scenarios.

Confirm archived styling does not leak into active lists; reopen path matches [T35] expectations if toggled.

items.title: [T05] Dropped main task
items.body:
Dropped parent state should stay visually distinct from Done.

Regression: export and summary treat dropped mains per product rules without affecting sibling fixtures.

items.title: [T06] ETA slip + effort increase
items.body:
Use when testing ETA drift and upward effort adjustments.

Verify timeline annotations and any “effort increased” hints stay in sync after edits.

items.title: [T07] Open + addressed concerns
items.body:
Concern workflow mix: open items vs addressed.

Check badges, filters that surface “needs attention”, and that addressed rows drop out of alert-style views.

items.title: [T08] Multi-category progress
items.body:
Multiple categories on one logical thread.

Ensure category chips filter correctly and progress rollups do not double-count shared parents.

items.title: [T09] Multiple bug IDs
items.body:
Several external IDs attached.

Confirm search-by-ID, copy/export formatting, and tooltip truncation on narrow layouts.

items.title: Archive / tags / multi-project sweep
items.body: Wide checklist for mixed fixtures: archive tab [T28], tags [T36]/[T37], multi-project [T38]/[T39], rollup [T44]–[T46].

checklist.text: VIS-QA parent: 24 subs visible when expanded.
Per-task sub visibility persisted after reload.
[T45] Dedicated sub effort split vs parent.
[T30] Partial day-off math vs calendar hours.

items.title: [T10] Very Hard / P10 priority bar color
items.body:
Stress-test priority visualization.

Confirm bar color slot P10 remains readable in dark/light assumptions and does not collide with warning hues used elsewhere.

items.title: [T11]–[T14] May week — kickoff through exec
items.body:
Week-of-May placeholders for planning vs execution density.

Use when validating week strip summaries and “May regression” labeling in UI copy.

items.title: [T15]–[T19] Calendar density Mon→Fri
items.body:
One task per weekday cluster to overload the calendar strip.

Look for clipping, tooltips, and hover affordances when multiple fixtures share the same day.

items.title: [T20]/[T21] Bandwidth hooks A & B
items.body:
Hook ordering experiments.

After navigation or filter changes, bandwidth-derived hints should remain deterministic for comparisons across sessions.

items.title: [T22] Summary range overlap
items.body:
Overlapping summary windows vs calendar selection.

Verify counts do not duplicate tasks straddling boundary dates.

items.title: [T23]/[T24] Export — HTML tags & markdown slice
items.body:
HTML export must not execute injected tags; markdown slice should respect start/end markers.

Compare rendered preview with raw export output.

items.title: [T25] Daily formatted hook
items.body:
Daily rollup narrative / formatted block.

Check timezone edges near midnight and DST-free May fixtures.

items.title: [T26]/[T27] List filters — Today / Yesterday
items.body:
Relative date filters.

Validate boundary at local midnight and that tasks exactly on boundary appear only once.

items.title: [T29] Notifications — ETA soon
items.body:
Soon-ETA banner / toast behavior.

Ensure suppressed when task marked done or dropped; no spam on refresh.

items.title: [T30] Partial day-off math
items.body:
Fractional availability.

Capacity calculations should reflect partial day-off without breaking weekly totals.

items.title: [T31]/[T32] Ongoing stale vs open idle
items.body:
Contrast long-running ongoing vs idle open tasks.

Stale indicators should track last activity fields if surfaced.

items.title: [T33]/[T34]/[T35] Done no archive / dropped late / re-open
items.body:
Lifecycle edges.

[Dropped late] vs [done without archive] vs [re-open style] should stay visually distinct in list + archive surfaces.

items.title: [T36]/[T37] Tags — #default vs #sprint
items.body:
Tag facets for filtering and export.

Collision tests with category-only fixtures below.

items.title: [T38]/[T39] Multi-project SR100 & F16
items.body:
Cross-project identifiers on one profile.

Ensure project headers/group-bys remain stable when sorting.

items.title: [T40]/[T41] Category-only — Design / Meeting
items.body:
Tasks that exist purely as category probes.

Empty or minimal descriptions should still list correctly under category-only filters.

items.title: [T42]/[T43] Sub exclude — summary vs export only
items.body:
Subs excluded from summary only or export only.

Regression matrix: toggle each flag independently and re-export.

items.title: [T44]/[T45]/[T46] Rollups — three subs / split effort / zero-hour main
items.body:
Rollup arithmetic torture tests.

Three-sub rollup vs dedicated sub effort split vs zero-hour main progress-only — totals must reconcile with inspector.

items.title: [T47] Large description rendered short
items.body:
Very long description body with abbreviated display.

Expand/collapse and tooltip preview should stay performant with markdown-ish noise.

items.title: [T48]/[T49]/[T50] ETA — same day & month-end pressure
items.body:
Same-day May 9 vs heavy load May 30–31.

Calendar + list should agree on ordering under “pressure” sorting if enabled.

items.title: [T28] Archive tab mix
items.body:
Mixed statuses coexisting in archive-oriented views.

Archive tab chips should not resurrect dropped tasks into active swimlanes.

items.title: Full May regression — ordered smoke list
items.body: Long checklist spanning fixtures T01–T50 + VIS-QA; use as session guide, not blocking.

checklist.text: Load profile cold start; no console errors.

items.title: Profile QA — padmakarr-testing-2 load sanity
items.body:
This JSON is a deliberate torture fixture for FlowAssist.

After edits, always File → Load Profile and confirm Notes board renders without normalization warnings.

items.title: Regression notes — how to use this board
items.body:
Prefer linking mentally from a note to its matching task title (e.g. search “[T17]”).

Todos above are actionable sweeps; free-form notes capture observations while clicking through May scenarios.
